metadata.description: AI-driven Specification-Driven Development (AI-SDD) workflow plugin marketplace. Supports multiple languages via SDD_LANG configuration.

plugins.name: sdd-workflow
plugins.description: A unified plugin supporting AI-driven Specification-Driven Development (AI-SDD) workflow. Prevents Vibe Coding problems and achieves high-quality implementations using specifications as the source of truth. Supports multiple languages via SDD_LANG configuration.
